noredlace_entries_unmatched_to_game.name: Slow Escape (old Slow Evasion) (old Evasion II)

distinct.noredlace_effect: 100% of level in Barrier against long-range damage (permanent)
At the start of combat, if the state bearer has 10 AP or less:  15% damage inflicted 10 Force of Will (if the character is at level 100 or greater)
At the start of combat, if the state bearer has 10% Critical Hit or less:  20% damage inflicted 50 Critical Resistance
At the start of combat, if the state bearer has at least 40% Critical Hit converts 100% of Critical Mastery to Elemental Mastery
At the start of combat, if the state bearer has 1 Range or less:  20% heals performed 15% Armor Given and Received
At the start of combat, if the state bearer has 40% Block or greater:  10% Critical Hit 10% damage inflicted on critical hit
The first spell that inflicts damage this turn removes 30% Armor from the target
If the bearer has only used one element to cause damage during their turn: they gain +20% to their Elemental Mastery in their other elements
30% Block if the bearer did not receive healing in the previous turn.

10% damage inflicted when the bearer meets certain conditions (these change each turn).  Turn 1: The bearer is in melee or the spell is single-target  Turn 2: The bearer is at a distance or the spell is single-target  Turn 3: The bearer is at a distance or the spell is area-of-effect  Turn 4: The bearer is in melee or the spell is area-of-effect
At the start of combat, for the state bearer:  -30% HP (penalty to the HP modifier) 30% Heals and Armor from fighters received
50 Elemental Resistance  -200 Rear Resistance for the bearer at the start of combat.
At the start of combat, if the highest Elemental Mastery is greater than Rear Mastery:  -20% damage inflicted 40% damage inflicted from behind
At the start of combat, if the bearer has exactly 0 Range:  +20% damage inflicted in melee and area of effect simultaneously
At the start of combat, if the state bearer has an odd number of AP:  250% of level as Lock and Dodge
If the bearer inflicts damage in an element:  they gain +15% Elemental Mastery in the other elements for the next spell.  Only the first line of damage caused by the spell is taken into account.

-10% Damage inflicted  Every 10 spells cast, the state bearer gains 100% Damage inflicted for the next spell  Spells cast must cost at least 1 AP  Once the state is at level 10, the next spell gets the damage bonus
In an uneven round:  The bearer inflicts 25% more damage, and suffers 15% of the damage they inflict
-30% damage received during their own turn.
Flaming (+15 Lvls.) (stackable) for the state bearer, for each damage spell received in melee.  100% of level as Flaming at start of turn if no enemies are adjacent.
5% indirect Damage [+1]
1 WP -30 Force of Will [+1]
At start of fight: All Masteries: 5% of level All Resistances: 3  [+1]
When HP are above 90%: 15% of level in Elemental Mastery [+1]
5% health points (bonus on HP modifier) [+1]
2% Damage Inflicted on targets in close combat [+1]
After suffering a loss of 3 AP: 10 Force of Will (3 turns) [+1]
After suffering a loss of 3 MP: 10 Force of Will (3 turns) [+1]
At the start of combat: All of the state bearers Dodge is converted into Armor at a ratio of 1 for 1. Converted Dodge is lost. [+1]
At start of fight: 5% Critical Hit (1 turn) 5% of level as Critical Mastery (1 turn) [+1]
50% Critical Hit -50% Damage and Heals [+1]

-5% to characteristic penalties received. Affects all characteristic penalties (Masteries, Resistances, Armor, Critical Hits, etc.) received in combat and cast by an entity other than the state bearer. The value is always rounded down. [+1]
3% Armor received [+1]
1 MP -20% Damage inflicted [+1]
1 AP -150 Elemental Resistance [+1]
When HP are at less than 50%: 5% Critical Hit [+1]
1 Range -300 Lock -300 Dodge [+1]
When HP are at less than 50%: 10% Lock [+1]
Performing a Block gives Preparation (+1 Lvl.) [+1]
When HP are at less than 50%: 10% Dodge [+1]
Reduces Ranged Damage suffered by 50% of level, 2 times per turn [+1]
When HP are at less than 50%: 5% Block [+1]
Increases Health Steals performed by 5% [+1]
3% Critical Hit [+1]
At start of fight, 150% of level as Armor [+1]
Even turns: 10 Force of Will Odd turns: -10 Force of Will [+1]
2% Damage Inflicted on aligned targets 2 or more cells away from the state bearer [+1]
3% Armor given [+1]
At end of turn, if a critical hit was performed:  Heal: 2% of HP lost of the caster [+1]
At the start of combat, if the state bearer has a Two-Handed Weapon equipped ( maximum 12 AP before the sublimation effect):  -2 max MP 2 max AP
At the start of combat, if the state bearer has a Dagger equipped:  25% damage inflicted on targets hit from the front 15% from the side -30% from behind
At the start of combat, if the bearer has a Shield equipped:  1 max MP Positive Range is set at 0
At the start of combat, if the state bearer has 8 WP or greater:  10 Force of Will 15% Block
At the start of combat: 20% damage inflicted and heals performed  -30% elemental mastery in the 3 weakest elements
25% to area-of-effect spell damage on the spell's direct target -25% to area-of-effect spell damage on other targets
15% damage inflicted by area-of-effect spells on targets in line with the state bearer
Even Turn:  After using a WP-based spell, the state bearer regains 2 AP (max of 1/turn).  Odd Turn:  After using a WP-based spell, the state bearer loses 2 AP (max 1/turn).
The state bearer increases their damage inflicted by 2% per turn (permanent) (max 20)
Damage caused by the bearer's weapon is reduced by 20% and applies a poison (Light Weapon) for three turns (second hand excluded) based on the number of AP used by the weapon.
5% health points (bonus on HP modifier) [+1]
When healing an ally, if the ally has less than 15% HP:  Heal: 7% of HP max of the target [+1]
If there are no allies 1 to 4 cells from the bearer: 2% Damage Inflicted [+1]
At end of turn: 50% of unused MP are carried over to the next turn Max 1 MP [+1]
At the start of combat, if the state bearer has less that 100% of their level as Dodge:  15% damage inflicted as Berserk 100% of level as Lock
At the start of combat, if the state bearer has 4 Range or greater:  15% damage inflicter as Berserk and Ranged simultaneously 1 Range
At the start of combat, if the state bearer has 50% Block or greater:  Bonus to HP modifier +30% -50% Armor Received
At the start of combat, if the state bearer has exactly 1 Range:  15% damage inflicted and heals performed on targets that are 2, 3, or 4 cells away from the caster
When suffering damage from the front and in melee, once per round:  10% of missing HP as Armor 40% Armor given (1 turn)
At start of turn, with 6 WP or greater:  Ancestral Energy Bonus (Max. level: 3): 4% Damage inflicted 15 Elemental Resistance The state is lost if the character starts their turn with less than 6 WP
-50 Elemental Resistance  Once per turn, when falling below 50% HP:  1 MP 15% Damage inflicted 50 Elemental Resistance
For each movement, per MP used:  +3% Block (max. 18) (1 turn)  If the state bearer performs a Block when it's not their turn:  The bonus is transformed into Critical Hits on the next turn
When inflicting damage on an enemy with a weapon: That enemy reduces their damage on the state bearer by -5% (1 turn, not stackable) The state bearer must have a shield equipped [+1]
At start of fight: -1 max WP For each WP spent during the turn: 2% damage inflicted (1 turn) (max 30) [+1]
Gains 50% of level as Flaming on killing an enemy (1 activation per turn) [+1]
When the state bearer starts their turn with all their WP (or all their QB): 10% Critical Hit (1 turn) [+1]
When the state bearer starts their turn with 50% or less of their WP (or their QB): 3% Critical Damage inflicted (1 turn) 100% of level as Armor [+1]
-10% Damage inflicted with a weapon When inflicting damage on an enemy with a two-handed weapon: Steals 15% of level in Lock (1 turn, not stackable) [+1]
-10% Damage inflicted with a weapon When inflicting damage on an enemy with a two-handed weapon: Steals 15% of level in Dodge (1 turn, not stackable) [+1]
When the state bearer suffers direct close-combat damage, once per turn of the attacker: The state bearer inflicts light damage on the attacker (10% of level) [+1]
If no other shield, dagger or two-handed weapon is equipped, at start of fight: 25% of level in Elemental Mastery 2% of Damage inflicted on a target with Armor [+1]
If the state bearer does not have any armor at end of turn: 50% of level as Armor [+1]
2% Damage from behind on even turns 2% frontal Damage on odd turns [+1]
Heal: 10% of HP lost of the caster   on killing an enemy (2 activations per turn) [+1]
3% Damage from behind -2% frontal and side Damage [+1]
If there are two or more allies 1 to 4 cells from the bearer: 2% Damage Inflicted [+1]
4% Armor given to an aligned ally at a distance [+1]
2% Heals performed on an aligned ally at a distance [+1]
Close-combat damage removes 50% of level in Armor from the target -3% Armor received [+1]
When the bearer starts their turn below 20% HP: 3% Damage inflicted (1 turn) 50% of level as armor [+1]
Ending a turn adjacent to an enemy applies -5% Armor received to it (1 turn) [+1]
Ending a turn adjacent to an enemy applies -5% Heals performed to it (1 turn) [+1]
2% non-critical damage and heals inflicted -2% critical damage and heals inflicted [+1]
-10% Heals Performed 4% of Heals Performed on allies are given back to the state bearer [+1]
When ending turn with less than 50% HP: Heals 5% of missing HP [+1]
The first critical hit in the turn inflicts 6% addititional damage The following ones inflict 3% less damage [+1]
When performing a block on a direct enemy attack: 2% damage inflicted (1 turn) -10% Block (1 turn) [+1]
3% critical damage inflicted if the target has > 50% HP -3% critical damage inflicted if the target has ≤ 50% HP [+1]
At the start of the fight, if secondary masteries are ≤ 0: 8% damage inflicted [+1]
At the start of the fight, if secondary masteries are ≤ 0: 0 RA and 0 max WP [+1]
At the start of the fight, if secondary masteries are ≤ 0: 5% Block [+1]
-1 max MP 5% Damage inflicted [+1]
-2 max AP 75 Elemental Resistance [+1]
-1 Range 50% of level as Lock and Dodge [+1]
Each time a critical hit is performed (5 activations per turn): Preparation (+2 Lvl.) [+1]
At start of turn, if no WP were used during the previous turn: 4% Damage inflicted 4% Heals performed [+1]
4% Damage inflicted on targets without line of sight 3 or more cells away from the state bearer [+1]
At the start of combat, per MP above 4: 2% Damage inflicted (maximum 24) [+1]
At the start of the first turn, if secondary masteries are <= 0: 5% Critical Hit [+1]

6% Damage inflicted in a diagonal line [+1]
6% Damage inflicted on a target with armor [+1]
